content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_explorer

SELECT * FROM
OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'propietary.tsv',
    DATA_SOURCE = 'electric_vehicle_data_bronze',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    FIELDTERMINATOR = '\t'
) WITH(
    propietaryid        TINYINT 1,
    electricUtility     VARCHAR(150)
) AS propietary;
